risk_analysis.analysis: Although not data center-specific, construction code changes could indirectly alter permitted infrastructure or costs for a build site.

results.title: Expressing support for a federally owned transcontinental pipeline system that runs from the western coast of the Mexico-United States border to refineries located along the Gulf Coast of Texas and Louisiana.
subject: Oil & Gas (I0545)
Resolutions--Legislative Policy (I0685)

risk_analysis.recap: HR 148 supports a transcontinental pipeline system, which is energy infrastructure adjacent to data center risk concerns.
risk_analysis.analysis: This resolution may signal state support for energy corridor development, but it does not create immediate water or energy limits for data centers.
